word: G1813 - ἐξαλείφω - exaleíphō - ex-al-i'-fo - Blot out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξαλείφω

- Transliteration: Exaleipho

- Phonetic: ex-al-i'-fo

- Definition:

1. to anoint or wash in every part

a. to besmear: i.e. cover with lime (to whitewash or plaster)

2. to wipe off, wipe away

a. to obliterate, erase, wipe out, blot out

- Origin: from G1537 and G218

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G218; to smear out that is obliterate (erase tears figuratively pardon sin): - blot out wipe away.
